agents.stance: Checks dramatic escalation, episode rhythm, and scene afterimage.
Checks hook density, bingeability, and episode-to-episode retention.
Checks causal anchors, continuity, and reveal-budget consistency.
Checks emotional readability, serial momentum, and curiosity gap.
Penalizes abstract emotion, generic summary, and non-sensory prose.
Scores only what would keep a tired reader moving to the next episode.

claim: Stage88 replaces external human editor/reader evaluation with a deterministic local AI-agent blind benchmark while preserving provider-zero and Node2 surface-only boundaries.
